creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
@Michael, for contributions that are only included in reviews, not patch attachments, please signal your approval by accepting the review/differential (in Phabricator).

@David/Michael Note however that its preferable to have patches attached in Bugzilla, leaving Phabricator for 'before its ready, before bugzilla' review. That way also, maintainer approval can be canonically provided (maintainer-approval flag)
